creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 170601
py-http-prompt.shar

It's an interactive command-line HTTP client featuring autocomplete
and syntax highlighting, built on HTTPie and prompt_toolkit.

There is a dependency for this port on PR 209732.
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=209732

Add new port devel/py-http-prompt
	- portlint compliant
	- poudriere tests ok

Poudriere tests:
